summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Current, Resistance, and Ohm's Law is a key topic in DC Circuits for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of current, resistance, and ohm's law.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding current, resistance, and ohm's law has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
